response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across diverse stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and has worked on high-throughput systems at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or growth/measurement infrastructure — all central to this IC6 Principal role. Leadership signals (workshops, founding GISCollective, mentoring) are present but lack evidence of cross-team Principal-level architectural ownership at enterprise scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, DLang, C/C++, Java, Python-adjacent) matching the language requirements
High-scale, low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of req/s
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Selenium courses, Fluent-Asserts library)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, or feature flagging systems
Title is Staff/Senior — no evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-org architectural leadership
Limited explicit experience with telemetry infrastructure, statistical analysis, or growth measurement

key_factors.factor: Polyglot engineering breadth and high-scale systems work
Seniority gap relative to IC6/Principal scope
